zh.lifeSummary: 當Gottfried III. von Arnsberg於1205年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫阿斯格時，他的父親Gottfried II. von Arnsberg48歲，母親Agnes von Rüdenberg18歲。他和Adelheid von Blieskastel至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1282年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnsberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Swedish (of German origin): habitational name from a place called as ‘eagle's mountain’ (see   Arend   and   Berg  ), probably Ahrensberg in Mecklenburg. Compare   Darensbourg  .

variants.name: Arend
meanings: German: from the personal name Arend of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule’.

variants.name: Darensbourg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Aurore, Camile, Pierre.

Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of German Arensberg . It is formed with the French preposition de ‘from’, spelled d' before a vowel. This surname is found mainly among African Americans.

History: The progenitor of many of the Darensbourgs was Karl Friedrich Arensberg, a German born in Stettin in Pomerania (today Szczecin in Poland), who arrived in LA in 1721. By 1724, Darensbourg, as he came to be known, was de facto leader of the German colony in LA.

nameMeanings.name: Gottfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from god, got ‘god’ + frid ‘peace’; borne by the 13th-century poet Gottfried von Strassburg.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gottfried III. von Arnsberg was born in 1205, in Arnsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Gottfried II. von Arnsberg, was 48 and his mother, Agnes von Rüdenberg, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Adelheid von Blieskastel. He died in 1282, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gottfried III. von Arnsberg est né en 1205, à Arnsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Gottfried II. von Arnsberg, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Rüdenberg, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Adelheid von Blieskastel. Il est décédé en 1282, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

Er hatte mit Adelheid von Blieskastel mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1282 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Adelheid von Blieskastel. Morì nel 1282, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gottfried III. von Arnsberg(이)가 1205년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 아른스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gottfried II. von Arnsberg(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes von Rüdenberg(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Blieskastel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gottfried III. von Arnsberg родился в 1205 г. в местности арнсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Gottfried II. von Arnsberg было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Rüdenberg, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Adelheid von Blieskastel. Он умер в 1282 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.
